title: Smooth Sail
description: This mod replaces Minecraft's binary boat steering with a smooth ramp.
body:
![Smooth Sail](https://i.imgur.com/xKA4HQP.gif) Tired of your boat jerking violently every time you try to make a simple adjustment? Smooth Sail transforms the clunky, binary movement of vanilla rowing into a fluid, professional handling experience. By introducing an intentional acceleration curve to your steering, this mod allows you to navigate tight rivers and narrow docks with a level of precision that was previously impossible.
FEATURES
Ramped Steering InputSmoothly accelerates from 0% to 100% over one second when steering, eliminating the violent snap of vanilla's binary input
Micro-AdjustmentsTapping the steer key applies only a tiny nudge, giving you precise control at low speed
HUD Feedback BarA bar appears over the XP bar slot while steering, showing your current input power
HOW TO USE
- Ride any boat and press ![A](https://img.shields.io/badge/A-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff) or ![D](https://img.shields.io/badge/D-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff) to steer. - Hold the key down to gradually reach 100% turning power over one second. - Tap the keys briefly to perform micro-corrections without oversteering. - Watch the bars overlaying the XP bar to see exactly how much power is being applied in real-time.
REQUIREMENTS
- Fabric Loader - Fabric API
CLIENT & SERVER
Some functionality exists on both the client and the server, making the mod required for the server but optional for the client.
FREE & OPEN SOURCE
This is a completely free project. I'm not asking for donations or "buy me a coffee" contributions. If you enjoy the mod, the best way to support it is by: - Leaving a rating/review - Sharing it with friends - Reporting any bugs you find
